description_long: This is a modern black laptop with a slim profile and a matte finish. The screen is open and displays the Windows 10 desktop, characterized by the recognizable blue background and Windows logo. The keyboard is full-sized with a QWERTY layout, and a touchpad is centered below the keyboard. The laptop's exterior is predominantly black, with a few stickers located on the right palm rest area. The device appears to be constructed from plastic and metal, with a glass screen and rubber feet likely on the underside. No visible ports are apparent from the provided views.
description: A sleek black laptop with a matte finish, open to display the Windows 10 desktop and a full QWERTY keyboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Windows 10 desktop, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and open screen; keyboard and touchpad are partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the laptop lid, with no visible branding or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slim profile and open screen; keyboard and touchpad are partially visible.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: A few stickers are present on the right palm rest area, near the keyboard and trackpad.
